name: brca_omics_gelu
notes: Baseline improvement 7/10: activation='gelu' replaces ReLU with the Gaussian Error Linear Unit. GELU smoothly gates the input by its Gaussian CDF — unlike ReLU it has a non-zero gradient for slightly-negative inputs, which eliminates the dying-neuron failure mode. It has been the default activation in transformer FFNs (BERT, GPT) since 2018 and consistently outperforms ReLU on NLP tasks; its smooth gradient landscape may also help convergence in the full-batch Cox training setting where each update is deterministic. Weight init switches from Kaiming to Xavier uniform, which does not assume a specific nonlinearity shape. All other settings identical to brca_omics_topk1000 (CI=0.6017).
